error_pattern: UI elements removed during overhaul but still referenced in core controllers (like omnibar commands)
fix: Ensure that legacy UI component references (like var_game_mode) are replaced with centralized config lookups and shared event handlers (_on_mode_change).
context: Omnibar crashed when attempting to queue for Arena because var_game_mode was removed from app_sidebar.

error_pattern: Pythonw.exe shortcut fails silently to launch the application
fix: Python execution context defaults to the script directory, breaking absolute imports from sibling folders. Inject sys.path.insert(0, os.path.abspath(os.path.join(os.path.dirname(__file__), '..'))) at the top of the entrypoint file to ensure imports resolve regardless of launch context.
context: Desktop shortcut pointing to pythonw.exe src/core/main.py failed because the 'src' folder wasn't in PYTHONPATH.

error_pattern: Acrylic Blur with CustomTkinter causes window to become completely invisible or text unreadable
fix: Do not attempt to use SetWindowCompositionAttribute with ACCENT_ENABLE_ACRYLICBLURBEHIND and -transparentcolor simultaneously in CustomTkinter. Keep acrylic blur disabled unless using a specialized library like pywinstyles that properly handles the DWM composition without washing out the canvas. Revert the code back to the disabled state with remove_blur(self).
context: Applying acrylic blur to LeagueLoopApp, SettingsModal, and MiniPlayer made the windows invisible to the user because setting -transparentcolor to the background color turns the window into a hole on modern Windows 11.

error_pattern: LCU Champ Select POST /complete fails silently or with 400 Bad Request
fix: Use PATCH /actions/{id} with data={"championId": id, "completed": True} instead of POST /complete.
context: Arena synergy and draft assistant failed to lock in champions due to empty JSON payloads being rejected by the LCU.

error_pattern: LCU Champ Select actions matrix iteration yields false teammate locked state
fix: Do not iterate the actions matrix to find completed: True. Instead, check the myTeam array for the player: teammate.get("championId", 0) != 0.
context: Arena synergy instantly locked in before the teammate chose because the actions matrix structure caused premature loop exit / false positives.
